markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Pivot content strategy from volume to conversion optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strong January Performance:** Exceeded targets with 58 MQLs and \>$5k pipeline created (vs. $1.4k goal), driven by 60% website traffic growth to 20k visitors.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** Pausing net-new content (except for the Okta OAG campaign) to focus on optimizing top-performing articles for conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=2331.0)
  - [**New Conversion Tactics:**](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
      - [**Competitor Pages:** Build dedicated comparison pages (e.g., Siit vs. Serval) to capture high-intent traffic from competitor review pages.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
      - [**Social Proof:** Embed customer quotes and logos directly into articles to build credibility and address sales team feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
  - [**Messaging Update:** Adopt "AI ITSM" over "AI-powered" to signal native, integrated AI capabilities, not a bolted-on feature.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=2935.0)

## Topics

### January Performance & Traffic Growth

  - [**Results:**](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
      - [**MQLs:** 58 (trials & demos)](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
      - [**Pipeline:** \>$5k created (vs. $1.4k goal), with one outlier deal \>$1k](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [**Traffic:** Website traffic grew 60% to 20k visitors.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
      - [Organic traffic to GrowthX URLs mirrors this growth, scaling from \~4k to \~12k sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [**Attribution Gap:** Inbound channel attribution remains unclear, a known issue to be fixed.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Content Audit & Optimization Strategy

  - [**Analysis:** The top 100 pages (driving \>30 sessions) were analyzed to identify optimization opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [**Listicles (21 pages):** High traffic, but often broad (e.g., "Best Procurement Software"). Optimization goal → move ICP traffic down the funnel.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
      - [**ITSM Guides (\~50% of top pages):** Directly target ICPs with topics like "Microsoft Teams IT Ticketing System Guide." These are the primary focus for conversion optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [**LLM Referrals:** Minimal (\~85 total site-wide), but traffic is likely highly qualified. Attribution is difficult, as users often engage in multi-shot conversations before clicking.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)

### New Conversion Tactics

  - [**1. Social Proof in Articles**](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
      - [**Problem:** Sales team reports prospects question Siit's legitimacy due to a lack of visible customer proof.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
      - [**Solution:** Embed customer quotes and logos directly into high-performing articles.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
      - [**Process:** Carmel will source quotes for key industries (e.g., FinTech, Healthcare).](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [**2. Competitor Comparison Pages**](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
      - [**Problem:** High-intent prospects are visiting competitor review pages (e.g., Serval) on the Siit site.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
      - [**Solution:** Create dedicated comparison pages (e.g., Siit vs. Serval), modeled on Hex's "Why companies choose Hex over Omni" page.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This scalable format uses generic elements (FAQ, video) with specific competitive points, requiring less unique content per page.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=2101.0)
      - [**Initial Focus:** JSM, Azure Service Management, and Serval.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=2283.0)

### Okta OAG Campaign

  - [**Context:** Pausing net-new content, but will produce articles for the Okta OAG campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=2874.0)
  - [**Messaging:** Position Siit as the one-stop ITSM solution, replacing the need for Okta OAG.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=2662.0)
      - [**OAG Stack:** Okta + OAG + ITSM (e.g., JSM)](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=2737.0)
      - [**Siit Stack:** Okta + Siit](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=2737.0)
      - [**Value Prop:** Siit eliminates tool burden by consolidating identity, app access, and ITSM.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=2673.0)

### Messaging & Personnel Updates

  - [**AI Messaging:** Adopt "AI ITSM" over "AI-powered" to signal native, integrated AI capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=2935.0)
  - [**Personnel:** Carmel is on maternity leave from May 1 to end of November. Manu will join next week as the replacement.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=2331.0)
      - [Share the list of high-priority articles for refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
      - [Send the Hex competitor page link to Carmel.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=2304.0)
      - [Consult GrowthX designers on UI/UX for embedding social proof.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=2405.0)
      - [Recap meeting decisions.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=2554.0)
  - [**Carmel:**](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=2554.0)
      - [Source customer quotes for the refresh topics.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
      - [Map out content and design for the initial competitor pages.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=2283.0)
      - [Investigate the Rangle "Add to Slack" CTA for engineering feasibility.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=2491.0)
      - [Invite Manu to the next weekly sync.](https://fathom.video/share/LsAVfwsxdomqVyMRz6yBKntra2cyvscL?tab=summary&timestamp=3017.0)
